html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.JE.Live recombinant vaccine decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Client is not due for JE vaccination Case 1
Client is not due for JE vaccination Case 2
Client is not due for JE vaccination
Client is not due for JE vaccination Guidance
Client is due for JE vaccination
Client is due for JE vaccination Guidance
JE immunization schedule is complete Guidance
